sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (a String, b UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_table SELECT * FROM format(JSONEachRow, 'a String, b UInt32', $${"a": "Hello", "b": 1}{"a": "World", "b": 2}$$);
UPDATE test_table SET b = b + 1 WHERE a = 'Hello';
SELECT * FROM format(JSONEachRow, 'a String, b UInt32', $${"a": "Test1", "b": 10}{"a": "Test2", "b": 20}$$);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM format(JSONEachRow, 'a String, b UInt32', $${"a": "Data1", "b": 100}{"a": "Data2", "b": 200}$$);
